task_completion.description: The agent successfully logged into the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the main dashboard or authenticated interface of the application, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile or logout button visible).

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the reports section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays a 'Reports' menu, dashboard, or page where different types of reports can be selected or generated.

task_completion.description: The agent selected the audit log or access events report type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the configuration or selection page specifically for an 'Audit Log', 'Access Events', or similar security/access report.

task_completion.description: The agent applied a filter for the specific patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report parameters or search fields show 'Rosa Bayer', 'PID: 2', or '2015-10-10' entered into the patient filter criteria.

task_completion.description: The agent set the report date range to the past 30 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date filter shows a 'Last 30 Days' preset selected, or custom start and end dates that correspond to the past 30 days.

task_completion.description: The final audit log report is generated and displayed on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A generated report (table, list, or document) showing access events or audit logs specifically for Rosa Bayer is visible on the screen.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's graphical user interface to generate the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the application's actual UI (menus, buttons, forms) rather than terminal commands, scripts, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The report is displayed within the genuine application interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final report appears inside the application's standard reporting UI, not in a basic text editor, notepad, or a manually created file.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply paste the task description to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is entered into appropriate, distinct fields (e.g., name in a name field, dates in date fields) rather than pasting the entire prompt into a single search bar or text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Rosa Bayer. Patient ID (PID): 2. Date of Birth (DOB): 2015-10-10. The report must be filtered to cover exactly the past 30 days.
